readecb 0.1.0
  • Reference
  • Changelog

Euro area monetary aggregates

Source: R/ecb_money_supply.R
ecb_money_supply.Rd

Returns outstanding amounts for M1, M2, or M3 monetary aggregates in the euro area.

Usage

ecb_money_supply(
  aggregate = c("M3", "M2", "M1"),
  from = NULL,
  to = NULL,
  cache = TRUE
)

Arguments

aggregate

One of "M3" (default), "M2", or "M1".

from

Optional start date.

to

Optional end date.

cache

Logical. Use cached data if available (default TRUE).

Value

A data frame with columns:

date

Date.

value

Numeric. Outstanding amount in millions of euros.

Examples

# \donttest{
ecb_money_supply("M3", from = "2020-01")
#> ℹ Fetching M3 data
#> ✔ Fetching M3 data [122ms]
#> 
#>          date    value
#> 1  2020-01-01 13016466
#> 2  2020-02-01 13108025
#> 3  2020-03-01 13457108
#> 4  2020-04-01 13631385
#> 5  2020-05-01 13841790
#> 6  2020-06-01 13924722
#> 7  2020-07-01 14024415
#> 8  2020-08-01 14040950
#> 9  2020-09-01 14126059
#> 10 2020-10-01 14247563
#> 11 2020-11-01 14370473
#> 12 2020-12-01 14503859
#> 13 2021-01-01 14574683
#> 14 2021-02-01 14634655
#> 15 2021-03-01 14716195
#> 16 2021-04-01 14799076
#> 17 2021-05-01 14908357
#> 18 2021-06-01 14997805
#> 19 2021-07-01 15168028
#> 20 2021-08-01 15208831
#> 21 2021-09-01 15233874
#> 22 2021-10-01 15366674
#> 23 2021-11-01 15449383
#> 24 2021-12-01 15539534
#> 25 2022-01-01 15546221
#> 26 2022-02-01 15584972
#> 27 2022-03-01 15683719
#> 28 2022-04-01 15811991
#> 29 2022-05-01 15857242
#> 30 2022-06-01 15945097
#> 31 2022-07-01 16066995
#> 32 2022-08-01 16137358
#> 33 2022-09-01 16182455
#> 34 2022-10-01 16103476
#> 35 2022-11-01 16155116
#> 36 2022-12-01 16135266
#> 37 2023-01-01 16033759
#> 38 2023-02-01 15999126
#> 39 2023-03-01 16003693
#> 40 2023-04-01 16006032
#> 41 2023-05-01 15989787
#> 42 2023-06-01 15988374
#> 43 2023-07-01 15984959
#> 44 2023-08-01 15945989
#> 45 2023-09-01 16001901
#> 46 2023-10-01 15956239
#> 47 2023-11-01 16021152
#> 48 2023-12-01 16193157
#> 49 2024-01-01 16055477
#> 50 2024-02-01 16051366
#> 51 2024-03-01 16180364
#> 52 2024-04-01 16203732
#> 53 2024-05-01 16232763
#> 54 2024-06-01 16396269
#> 55 2024-07-01 16386382
#> 56 2024-08-01 16480207
#> 57 2024-09-01 16524547
#> 58 2024-10-01 16547802
#> 59 2024-11-01 16739983
#> 60 2024-12-01 16832012
#> 61 2025-01-01 16738914
#> 62 2025-02-01 16765422
#> 63 2025-03-01 16800962
#> 64 2025-04-01 16866004
#> 65 2025-05-01 16930595
#> 66 2025-06-01 16921078
#> 67 2025-07-01 16945070
#> 68 2025-08-01 16950635
#> 69 2025-09-01 16977573
#> 70 2025-10-01 17045634
#> 71 2025-11-01 17243635
#> 72 2025-12-01 17273645
#> 73 2026-01-01 17317789
# }
